state.next-action: Phase `08` is closed: the employee copilot beta now has sanitized audit logging, per-user rate limits, a kill switch, component-level panel coverage, and a gated Playwright smoke that proves the beta UI can launch into the CRM workspace with the right tab context. Resume `03-11` next so the public marketing shell catches up to the stronger portal/AI experience, then return to `09-06` CLI polish.
